Business banking /
Payment solutions /
In-person payments

IN-PERSON PAYMENTS

Enhance customer
payments and
business operations.

Whether you’re a small business or a growing enterprise, our versatile payment and point-of-sale (POS) solutions let your customers pay in person, wherever you do business.

  • Scalable options for any industry

  • Over 200 available integrations to unify your operations

  • Simple, safe and secure payments

Empower your business to accept customer payments with ease.

Experience powerful, feature-rich platforms.

U.S. Bank’s payment solutions are built to seamlessly integrate with your operations and support different payment types in a single platform.

Give customers more ways to pay.

From traditional credit and debit cards to digital wallets, U.S. Bank payment solutions and POS plans ensure that your business remains accessible and adaptable to evolving customer preferences.

Protect customer and company data.

With EMV chip cards, contactless payment options and end-to-end encryption, your customer payment data is protected by the latest authentication and security technology.

Enjoy access to quick funding.

Enhance cash flow with top-tier funding. Access your funds within hours of payment processing, available daily without limits.1

Find your perfect payment solution.

Choose from a range of customizable options to create a solution that perfectly aligns with your business goals and customer expectations.

Point of sale

Our range of full-service plans are built for businesses needing a more advanced solution. Each plan is customizable and comes with a register, cash drawer, card reader and software options for your needs.

Learn more

Mobile payment solutions

Accept customer payments at the counter, in the field, at a jobsite or anywhere business takes you. All you need to get started is a smartphone; there's no need for expensive hardware or software.

Learn more

Smart terminal

For small businesses that want a handheld device to enhance mobile POS capabilities, the smart terminal is ideal. With a built-in card reader, printer and long-lasting battery, you have the power to sell all day without interruption.

Learn more

Customize your POS plan.

Regardless of your industry or business size, we have a payment solution for you. Work with a payment specialist to build a custom solution of POS features and recommended hardware to enhance your daily operations.

Contact a specialist

Do more for your business.

Optimize daily operations.

With built-in features like inventory management, invoicing, online ordering and appointment booking, you can easily streamline processes and automate tasks.

Propel your business forward.

Generate fully customizable reports to understand sales trends, cost analysis, customer spending and other activities that offer actionable business insights.

Get support when you need it.

We’re here to help with 24/7 support to keep your business running smoothly. A real person is always available to answer your questions at no additional cost.

Frequently asked questions

All major credit and debit cards accepted:

  • Visa®
  • MasterCard®
  • Discover®
  • American Express®

Contactless payments accepted:

  • Apple PayTM
  • Google PayTM
  • Tap to Pay on iPhone2

Yes, U.S. Bank Payment Solutions include a dashboard and mobile app that have over 200 direct integrations and features available, ensuring compatibility and ease of use with your existing system.

Our flexible solutions support a variety of POS systems, allowing you to choose the option that best suits your specific business needs. Trust us to provide reliable integration and onboarding services, so you get up and running quickly.

At the most basic level, we offer our mobile payment solution, for which you only need a smartphone and a mobile POS app to begin accepting payments.

Beyond that, the software and/or hardware you choose is entirely up to you.

You may choose to add any of the following to your payment solution plan:

  • Wireless terminal
  • Smartphone-compatible card reader
  • Full-service Point of sale
  • Specialized software solutions designed for specific industries like restaurant, retail, services, healthcare, hospitality, etc.
  • Ecommerce capabilities allowing secure payment transactions through a website.

Whether you already own POS hardware or need to purchase or rent it, all equipment must comply with the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) for protecting cardholder information. PCI DSS compliance validation information can be found at pcisecuritystandards.org.

Power your online store with U.S. Bank's ecommerce payment solutions featuring secure checkout, flexible integrations and trusted processing.

payment solutions

Online payments

Give customers more ways to make online payments with ecommerce solutions and buy now, pay later options.

Learn more

Let’s connect.

Explore locations

Find the U.S. Bank branch nearest you.

Make an appointment

Schedule a virtual or in-person meeting with a business banker.

Request a call

Fill in details about your banking needs and a representative will call you.

Call us

Call 800-432-9413 to talk with a representative right away.

Start of disclosure content
Footnote
Return to content, Footnote

Disclosures

  1. Everyday Funding is available at no additional charge to U.S. Bank Payment Solutions merchants with a U.S. Bank Business Checking account. Funding speed is dependent on batch times and will be processed every day, including weekends and holidays. Activation may take between three to five business days from date of Everyday Funding service request. Once the file is activated, there will be a change in the description of the payment when it is posted to your bank account.

  2. Tap to Pay on iPhone requires a supported payment app and the latest version of iOS. Update to the latest version by going to Settings > General > Software Update. Tap Download and Install. Some contactless cards may not be accepted by your payment app. Transaction amount limit may apply based on card issuer or network rules. The Contactless Symbol is a trademark owned by and used with permission of EMVCo, LLC. Tap to Pay on iPhone is not available in all markets. For Tap to Pay on iPhone countries and regions, see https://developer.apple.com/tap-to-pay/regions/.

    Apple Pay is a service provided by Apple Payments Services LLC, a subsidiary of Apple Inc. Neither Apple Inc. nor Apple Payments Services LLC is a bank. Any card used in Apple Pay is offered by the card issuer.

Start of disclosure content

Apple Pay is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. App Store is a service mark of Apple Inc.

Google Pay, Android and Google Play are trademarks of Google LLC. Fitbit Pay is a trademark of Fitbit LLC and/or its affiliates.

Deposit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC.

Services may be subject to credit approval. Eligibility requirements, restrictions and fees may apply. See a business banker for details.

Using these programs requires a merchant processing account. See a business banker for details.

U.S. Bank Payment Solutions are powered by Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank NA, and may have different privacy and security policies than U.S. Bank. For additional details, refer to the information found on the U.S. Bank Payment Solutions Privacy & Terms of Service page.
